title: lithocarpus longipedicellatus
intro: Lithocarpus longipedicellatus, also known as the Himalayan Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Himalayan region. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus longipedicellatus include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant, as well as its potential to treat various skin conditions and wounds. Lithocarpus longipedicellatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine practices in the Himalayan region.
